summary: Gamma Fallback Safety Net fully verified. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: No gamma-fallback-warning displayed with real gamma (yfinance working). Gamma levels correctly futures-converted (Put Wall 23,927, ZGL 24,450, Call Wall 24,339). TICK Index correctly removed. N1 shows using_fallback_gamma=false and gamma_warning=null.

✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ — context.call_wall, put_wall, zgl > 10000 (futures converted)
✅ N1 score_breakdown Gamma/ZGL uses SENTIMENT/ZGL_SIGNAL format (e.g., POSITIVE/ABOVE_ZGL)
✅ Unit test: TRANSICAO with fallback gamma → lot_pct halved (50→25)
✅ Unit test: CAPITULACAO with fallback gamma → lot_pct halved (50→25)
✅ Unit test: BULL with fallback gamma → no penalty (lot_pct=100)
✅ Unit test: BEAR with fallback gamma → no penalty (lot_pct=100)
✅ Unit test: COMPLACENCIA with fallback gamma → no penalty (lot_pct=75)
✅ Unit test: TRANSICAO with real gamma → lot_pct=50 (no penalty)
✅ Unit test: CAPITULACAO with real gamma → lot_pct=50 (no penalty)
✅ N3 signal structure verified (action, reason fields)
✅ Fallback blocking code verified in server.py (CAPITULACAO blocks ALL, TRANSICAO blocks primary trigger)
✅ source='price_estimated' triggers using_fallback_gamma=true
✅ source='yfinance' does NOT trigger fallback
✅ source='yfinance_options' does NOT trigger fallback
✅ Frontend: gamma-fallback-warning NOT in DOM with real gamma

✅ Frontend: Gamma panel shows futures-converted levels (Put Wall 23,927, ZGL 24,450, Call Wall 24,339)
✅ Frontend: No console errors
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using simulated weekend data + real yfinance gamma data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamma Fallback Safety Net tested. The safety net works as follows: (1) using_fallback_gamma flag is set when gamma source is 'price_estimated' or 'fallback'. (2) For TRANSICAO/CAPITULACAO regimes with fallback gamma, lot_pct is halved (50→25). (3) CAPITULACAO N3 blocks ALL entries when fallback (returns WAIT with 'Gamma fallback ativo: Put Wall ficticia'). (4) TRANSICAO N3 blocks primary trigger (absorption at Walls) when fallback, allowing only secondary trigger (N2 DZ Z-Score). (5) BULL/BEAR/COMPLACENCIA are NOT affected by fallback. (6) Frontend shows gamma-fallback-warning div only when using_fallback_gamma=true AND regime is TRANSICAO/CAPITULACAO. Currently yfinance is working so using_fallback_gamma=false in live tests.

feature_verification.gamma_warning_field: Working - null when real gamma, string when fallback
feature_verification.transicao_primary_trigger_blocking: Working - blocks absorption trigger with fallback

mocked_api_note: DataBento live trades simulated on weekends. Gamma data is REAL from yfinance options chain (QQQ/SPY). SignalStack orders are MOCKED in paper mode.
